name: From Patterns to Maze Structures: SMT-Based Path Synthesis and 2D/3D Construction

description: arXiv:2607.09781v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a pipeline for constructing maze structures from input patterns such as text or shapes. The central path-synthesis problem is encoded in Satisfiability Modulo Theories as global constraints on adjacency, continuity, and pattern-constrained coverage, allowing each fixed-bound instance to be solved in one call. author: Shengyi Wang
